content.json:
# Azure Front Door — CDN + WAF Dashboard

Operational visibility for the Azure Front Door sandbox.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "FrontDoorAccessLog"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize RequestCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Requests Over Time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "FrontDoorAccessLog"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by httpStatusCode_s
| render piechart
content.title: Response Status Codes

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "FrontDoorAccessLog"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by cacheStatus_s
| render piechart
content.title: Cache Hit/Miss Ratio

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "FrontDoorAccessLog"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize AvgLatency = avg(timeTaken_d), P95 = percentile(timeTaken_d, 95) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Latency (Avg & P95)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by action_s, ruleName_s
| sort by Count desc
content.title: WAF Actions by Rule

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"
| where action_s == "Block"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Blocks = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: WAF Blocks Over Time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "FrontDoorHealthProbeLog"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by healthProbeStatus_s, originName_s
| render barchart
content.title: Health Probe Results by Origin
